Verify (schema migrations run automatically on first connection)\npython -c \"from mnemosyne import Memory; m = Memory(); print(m.stats())\"\n","language":"bash"}]

There is no ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.migrate"}]," command. If migration fails, check logs with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LOG_LEVEL=debug"}],"."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Schema Migrations"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne uses automatic schema migrations:"}]
d:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Version"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Migration"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"1.0 → 2.0"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"m_1_0_to_2_0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add semantic memory, FTS5 indices"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.0 → 2.1"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"m_2_0_to_2_1"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add session_id to episodic"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2.1 → 2.2"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"m_2_1_to_2_2"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add temporal graph indexes"}]]}]]}]]}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Migrations run automatically on first connection. No manual intervention needed."}]
f:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Cross-Instance Migration"}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Export from old instance, import to new using the Python SDK:"}]
11:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# Export from old database\nold_mem = Memory(db_path=\"old.db\")\nold_mem.export_to_file(\"export.json\")\n\n# Import into new database\nnew_mem = Memory(db_path=\"new.db\")\nnew_mem.import_from_file(\"export.json\")\n\n# Verify\nprint(new_mem.stats())\n","language":"python"}]
12:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Export Formats"}]

15:["$","p",null,{"children":"For migrating from pre-2.0 data formats, use the migration script:"}]
16:["$","$L21",null,{"code":"python scripts/migrate_from_legacy.py --db mnemosyne.db\n","language":"bash"}]
17:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Rollback"}]
